Name: EquipParamFcs
Description: Determines the parameters of fire control system parts.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Model ID
Fields.Description: The model ID for this part. Also determines the menu preview icon.

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: Determines the order of this part in the menu.

Fields.Name: Energy Capacity
Fields.Description: The energy capacity of this FCS.

Fields.Name: Energy Output
Fields.Description: The energy recovery rate. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: The consumption rate of energy. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Energy Output Delay
Fields.Description: The delay before energy recovery starts. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Prediction: Bullet Velocity
Fields.Description: Parameters for calculating the predicted position in a separate frame from the weapon.

Fields.Name: Prediction: Maximum Firing Offset
Fields.Description: The value that reaches a ceiling when the prediction difference becomes too large.

Fields.Name: Prediction: Starting Distance
Fields.Description: Distance to start calculating prediction rate.

Fields.Name: Energy Output Delay (when Empty)
Fields.Description: The delay before energy recovery starts if empty. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Missle Lock Performance
Fields.Description: Correction value for missile lock time.

Fields.Name: Sell Value
Fields.Description: Price to sell the item for.

Fields.Name: Sale Value
Fields.Description: Price the item is on sale for.

Fields.Name: Inherited FCS ID
Fields.Description: FCS ID to inherit parameters from.

Fields.Name: Prediction Addition Correction
Fields.Description: Correction multiplier for the prediction rate addition amount

Fields.Name: Prediction Subtraction Correction
Fields.Description: Correction multiplier for the prediction rate subtraction amount

Fields.Name: Distance Threshold Coefficient [0]
Fields.Description:
Stage growth is a multiplier of the maximum growth that will occur in a certain stage, as an example a chart such as this:
Growth Stage 0 - Growth = 20 - 20%% of the total scaling is reached at stage 0.
Growth Stage 1 - Growth = 25 - 25%% of the total scaling is reached at stage 1.
Growth Stage 2 - Growth = 50 - 50%% of the total scaling is reached at stage 2.
Growth Stage 3 - Growth = 80 - 80%% of the total scaling is reached at stage 3.
Growth Stage 4 - Growth = 90 - 90%% of the total scaling is reached at stage 4.
As you can see, in this specific chart 100%% is never reached, 100%% could be reached if only the value of growth stage 4 was 100%
This is not limited to 100%% as an example growth stage 4 could reach 200%%.
The level cap of a growth stage is specified in the corresponding Distance Threshold field.
